name: UNITIL CORP
summary: Unitil Corporation is a public utility holding company incorporated in New Hampshire in 1984. It distributes electricity and natural gas to approximately 215,100 customers across New Hampshire, Massachusetts, and Maine through five distribution utilities: Unitil Energy, Fitchburg, Northern Utilities, Bangor Natural Gas, and Maine Natural Gas. It also operates Granite State, an interstate natural gas transmission pipeline. Total operating revenue was $536.0 million in 2025, with net utility plant of $1.8 billion.
